reasoning: The current index point is 327.455 as of December 2025 based on FRED/S&P data, and it needs to hit 350.0 by July 2027 (which implies a summer 2026 or summer 2027 peak over 350). The NSA index naturally jumps around 4-5% from winter troughs to summer peaks. To hit 350 in summer 2027, the underlying year-over-year annual growth needs to average around 2.5%. YoY growth in late 2025 was sluggish at 1.3-1.5%, which would have the index peak just shy of 350 (around 347-349). However, a slight improvement in the housing market or minor inflation would easily carry the peak over 350. This aligns closely with the crowd consensus of 45%. Three probabilities are provided due to the N/A split artifact in the resolution dates.
